selected_important_turn.text: I would take 3 packages of food and just 1 package of water. Is it okay for you?
selected_important_turn.why_important: This concrete, self-favoring allocation hardened the distribution battle at a key moment: the opponent had just proposed a conditional trade (give 1 food in exchange for water/firewood). Responding with a maximal food demand pushed the interaction into a zero-sum frame and directly preceded rejection.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: The offer is rigid and greedy (taking 3 foods) when the opponent already signaled strong need for food. It ignored the opponent's trade proposal and missed a chance to create a mutually beneficial exchange; it therefore reduced chances of agreement and damaged rapport.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Shift from a take-it-or-leave-it demand to a responsive, integrative proposal: acknowledge their food need, quantify what you can concede, and propose a clear trade (e.g., smaller food claim in exchange for specified water/firewood). Or ask a quick question about their minimum on food before proposing numbers.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: likely increase (by enabling trades rather than fighting over the same item)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (more balanced split that accounts for both parties' needs)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: substantially increase (reduces rejection risk and moves toward deal)

value2reason.Low: As we were prepared to preserve water, it is needed in less priority
value2reason.Medium: As we could cook our own food for us it will be helpful if we get firewood
value2reason.High: As we undergone fasting in the recent days for some spiritual purpose, this is the day we could eat food after 2 days. So we need additional packages of food

value2reason.Low: Because, my area is so cold, So I want firewoods.
value2reason.Medium: Want to drink and stay healthy
value2reason.High: Because food is important for live

dialogue.text: Kindly understand our need as we are struggling with hunger now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: At the same from my side. We need foods because my child is hunger
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: We with our kids undergone fasting in the recent days, so we are hungry to the peak
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: What did you expect from me? Because same position is here also
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I would like to share water with you as we already have it in some quantity
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I am ready to give 1 amount of food for you. But I want some quantity of water and firewood for me.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I would take 3 packages of food and just 1 package of water. Is it okay for you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I can offer you 2 food packages and 1 water package, but I need 1 firewood package to balance the deal. It’s fair considering my priority for food and firewood.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
